title: 4 Black Octagonal Plant Pot Plastic Winchester Garden Flower Patio Planter 36cm
features: This traditional octagonal bell pot is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use for all kinds of plants and shrubs.
Featuring a unique self watering design at the base of the pot. Simply drill out the drainage holes from the base and the pot will create a self watering reservoir at approx 6cm deep.
description: Set Of 4 Winchester Bell Pot Octagonal plastic plant pot. Black Colour. Overall diameter 36cm including rim approx. Height 28.5cm approx. Internal diameter 30cm approx. Internal height 28cm approx. This traditional octagonal bell pot is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use for all kinds of plants and shrubs. Featuring a unique self watering design at the base of the pot. Simply drill out the drainage holes from the base and the pot will create a self watering reservoir at approx 6cm deep.
